message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF

skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5

skinparam participantGradientStartTranslateX 0

skinparam participantGradientEndTranslateY 0

skinparam participantGradientEndRotate 0

skinparam participantGradientEndSkewY 0

skinparam participantGradientEndSkewZ 0

skinparam participantGradientEndRotateZ 0

skinparam participantGradientEndShearX 0

skinparam participantGradientEndShearZ 0

skinparam participantGradientEndTranslateX 0
skinparam participantGradientStartTranslateY 0
skinparam participantGradientEndTranslateY 0
skinparam participantGradientStartTranslateZ 0
skinparam participantGradientEndTranslateZ 0

actor "Usuario" as Usuario
participant "boundary" as boundary
participant "control" as control
participant "Equipos" as Equipos
participant ":Equipo" as Equipo

Usuario -> boundary: expelTeam(data)
boundary -> control
control -> Equipos: expelTeam(data)
Equipos -> Equipo

@enduml
